mapper.sql: A.NREQUEST_ASSIGN_SEQ, A.STITLE, A.SCONTENTS, A.NLVL_MST_SEQ , A.SAPY_USER_ID, A.DAPY_DT, A.NAPY_IP_CNT, A.STRT_CONTENTS , A.DTRT_DT, A.STRT_USER_ID, A.SREQUEST_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD, A.DCREATE_DT , A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID , A.SASSIGNCONTENTS , A.NASSIGN_IP_CNT

, C.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AS SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , C.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM AS SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , D.SLVL_CD AS SSVC_GROUP_CD , D.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM , E.SLVL_CD AS SSVC_OBJ_CD , E.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM , F.SUSER_NM AS SAPY_USER_NM , F.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID AS SAPY_USER_DEPT_ORG_CD , G.SORG_NM AS SAPY_USER_DEPT_ORG_NM , H.SUSER_NM AS STRT_USER_NM , I.SREQUEST_ASSIGN_TYPE_NM AS SREQUEST_ASSIGN_TYPE_NM ,(SELECT STRING_AGG(SORG_NM,'-') FROM (SELECT SORG_NM FROM MST.TB_ORG_BAS AS FO START WITH FO.SKT_ORG_ID = F.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID CONNECT BY FO.SKT_ORG_ID = PRIOR FO.SUP_KT_ORG_ID ORDER BY FO.SORG_PREF_ODRG) ) AS SAPY_USER_FULL_DEPT_ORG_NM

, A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , A.SSVC_GROUP_CD , A.SSVC_GROUP_NM , A.SSVC_OBJ_CD , A.SSVC_OBJ_NM , A.SAPY_USER_NM , A.SAPY_USER_DEPT_ORG_CD , A.SAPY_USER_DEPT_ORG_NM , A.STRT_USER_NM , A.SREQUEST_ASSIGN_TYPE_NM , A.SAPY_USER_FULL_DEPT_ORG_NM
, MST.TB_LVL_MST B , MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD C , MST.TB_LVL_CD D , MST.TB_LVL_CD E , MST.TB_USER_BAS F , MST.TB_ORG_BAS G , MST.TB_USER_BAS H , MST.TB_REQUEST_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD I

AND A.NLVL_MST_SEQ = B.NLVL_MST_SEQ AND B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = C.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) AND B.SSVC_GROUP_CD = D.SLVL_CD(+) AND B.SSVC_OBJ_CD = E.SLVL_CD(+) AND A.SAPY_USER_ID = F.SUSER_ID(+) AND F.SPOS_DEPT_ORG_ID = G.SKT_ORG_ID(+) AND A.STRT_USER_ID = H.SUSER_ID(+) AND A.SREQUEST_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD = I.SREQUEST_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD(+)
mapper.select: SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM MST.TB_REQUEST_ASSIGN_MST A

SELECT SSVC_GROUP_CD , SSVC_GROUP_NM , SSVC_HIGH_CD , SSVC_HIGH_NM , ASSIGN_CNT , ALLOC_CNT , ASSIGN_CE_CNT , ASSIGN_CL_CNT , SFLAG , L3_ALL_CNT , L3_OPT_CNT , IP_OPT_CNT , SDHCP_FALG , NCNT_SUM , NCNT_ALL , SANAL_FLAG , NCNT_NEOSS , SFACT_FLAG , NALLOC_24 , NALLOC_24_OVER , NALLOC_OUT_24 , NALLOC_OUT_24_OVER , NCNT_IP , SFLAG_ALL::VARCHAR(1) AS SFLAG_ALL FROM (
SELECT M0.SSVC_GROUP_CD, AG.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM, M0.SSVC_HIGH_CD, AH.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_HIGH_NM , NVL(ASSIGN_CNT,0) AS ASSIGN_CNT, NVL(ALLOC_CNT,0) AS ALLOC_CNT, NVL(ASSIGN_CE_CNT,0) AS ASSIGN_CE_CNT, NVL(ASSIGN_CL_CNT,0) AS ASSIGN_CL_CNT, NVL(SFLAG::VARCHAR(1), 'N'::VARCHAR(1)) AS SFLAG , NVL(L3_ALL_CNT,0) AS L3_ALL_CNT, NVL(L3_OPT_CNT,0) AS L3_OPT_CNT, NVL(IP_OPT_CNT,0) AS IP_OPT_CNT , NVL(SDHCP_FALG::VARCHAR(1), 'N'::VARCHAR(1)) AS SDHCP_FALG , NVL(NCNT_SUM,0) AS NCNT_SUM, NVL(NCNT_ALL,0) AS NCNT_ALL, NVL(SANAL_FLAG::VARCHAR(1), 'N'::VARCHAR(1)) AS SANAL_FLAG , NVL(NCNT_NEOSS,0) AS NCNT_NEOSS, NVL(SFACT_FLAG::VARCHAR(1), 'N'::VARCHAR(1)) AS SFACT_FLAG , NVL(NALLOC_24,0) AS NALLOC_24, NVL(NALLOC_24_OVER,0) AS NALLOC_24_OVER, NVL(NALLOC_OUT_24,0) AS NALLOC_OUT_24 , NVL(NALLOC_OUT_24_OVER,0) AS NALLOC_OUT_24_OVER , ROUND( NVL(NCNT_IP,0)/256) AS NCNT_IP , CASE WHEN SFLAG = 'Y' AND SDHCP_FALG = 'Y' AND SANAL_FLAG = 'Y' AND SFACT_FLAG = 'Y' AND NCNT_IP < 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SFLAG_ALL
FROM (SELECT A.SSVC_GROUP_CD, A.SSVC_HIGH_CD FROM MST.TB_LVL_ROLE_MST A INNER JOIN MST.TB_LVL_MST B ON A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AND A.SSVC_GROUP_CD = B.SSVC_GROUP_CD AND A.SSVC_OBJ_CD = B.SSVC_OBJ_CD
AND B.NLVL_MST_SEQ IN
#{item.nlvlSeq}
GROUP BY A.SSVC_GROUP_CD, A.SSVC_HIGH_CD) M0 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SSVC_GROUP_CD, SSVC_HIGH_CD, ASSIGN_CNT, ALLOC_CNT, ASSIGN_CE_CNT, ASSIGN_CL_CNT , DECODE(ASSIGN_CNT,0,'N',CASE WHEN ALLOC_CNT * 100 / ASSIGN_CNT > NMAIN_NODE_ASSIGN_VALUE AND ASSIGN_CE_CNT * 100 / ASSIGN_CNT < NMAIN_NODE_ASSIGN_NO_VALUE THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ) AS SFLAG FROM ( SELECT SSVC_GROUP_CD, SSVC_HIGH_CD, MAX(ASSIGN_CNT) AS ASSIGN_CNT, MAX(ALLOC_CNT) AS ALLOC_CNT, MAX(ASSIGN_CE_CNT) AS ASSIGN_CE_CNT, MAX(ASSIGN_CL_CNT) AS ASSIGN_CL_CNT FROM ( SELECT DECODE(LV.SSVC_GROUP_CD,'','000000',NULL,'000000',LV.SSVC_GROUP_CD) AS SSVC_GROUP_CD, DECODE(LS.SSVC_HIGH_CD,'','000000',NULL,'000000',LS.SSVC_HIGH_CD) AS SSVC_HIGH_CD, SUM(NCNT) AS ASSIGN_CNT, SUM(DECODE(SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD,'IA0005',NCNT,'IA0006',NCNT,0)) AS ALLOC_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD = 'IA0003' AND NBITMASK = 24 THEN NCNT WHEN SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD = 'IA0004' AND NBITMASK = 24 THEN NCNT ELSE 0 END) AS ASSIGN_CE_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD = 'IA0003' AND NBITMASK > 24 THEN NCNT WHEN SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD = 'IA0004' AND NBITMASK > 24 THEN NCNT ELSE 0 END) AS ASSIGN_CL_CNT FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST MM LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_MST LV ON MM.NLVL_MST_SEQ = LV.NLVL_MST_SEQ LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_ROLE_MST LS ON LV.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = LS.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AND LV.SSVC_GROUP_CD = LS.SSVC_GROUP_CD AND LV.SSVC_OBJ_CD = LS.SSVC_OBJ_CD WHERE SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = 'CV0001' AND SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD IN ('IA0003','IA0004','IA0005','IA0006')
GROUP BY DECODE(LV.SSVC_GROUP_CD,'','000000',NULL,'000000',LV.SSVC_GROUP_CD), DECODE(LS.SSVC_HIGH_CD,'','000000',NULL,'000000',LS.SSVC_HIGH_CD) ) MMM WHERE SSVC_GROUP_CD != '000000' AND SSVC_HIGH_CD != '000000' GROUP BY SSVC_GROUP_CD, SSVC_HIGH_CD ) LEFT JOIN MST.TB_AUDIT_ASSIGN_BAS BAS ON 1=1 )M1 ON M0.SSVC_GROUP_CD = M1.SSVC_GROUP_CD AND M0.SSVC_HIGH_CD = M1.SSVC_HIGH_CD LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.SSVC_GROUP_CD, A.SSVC_HIGH_CD, A.L3_CNT AS L3_ALL_CNT, NVL(B.L3_CNT,0) AS L3_OPT_CNT, NVL(B.NIP_SUM,0) AS IP_OPT_CNT, CASE WHEN (B.L3_CNT * 100 / A.L3_CNT) < NMAIN_NODE_DHCP_VALUE THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS SDHCP_FALG FROM( SELECT SSVC_GROUP_CD, SSVC_HIGH_CD, COUNT(DISTINCT SL3_NESCODE) AS L3_CNT, SUM(NIP_CNT) AS NIP_SUM FROM ( SELECT DECODE(LS.SSVC_GROUP_CD,'','000000',NULL,'000000',LS.SSVC_GROUP_CD) AS SSVC_GROUP_CD, DECODE(LS.SSVC_HIGH_CD,'','000000',NULL,'000000',LS.SSVC_HIGH_CD) AS SSVC_HIGH_CD,
SL3_NESCODE, NIP_CNT FROM BIF.TB_DHCP_GET_SUBNET MM LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_ROLE_SUB LV ON MM.SOFFICE_CD = LV.SSVC_OFFICE_CD LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_ROLE_MST LS ON MM.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = LS.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AND LV.SSVC_OBJ_CD = LS.SSVC_OBJ_CD WHERE SGET_DT = (SELECT MAX(SGET_DT) FROM BIF.TB_DHCP_GET_SUBNET) ) MMM GROUP BY SSVC_GROUP_CD, SSVC_HIGH_CD ) A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SSVC_GROUP_CD, SSVC_HIGH_CD, COUNT(DISTINCT SL3_NESCODE) AS L3_CNT, ROUND(SUM(NIP_CNT * (100 - NMIN_PEAK) * 0.01),0) AS NIP_SUM FROM ( SELECT DECODE(LS.SSVC_GROUP_CD,'','000000',NULL,'000000',LS.SSVC_GROUP_CD) AS SSVC_GROUP_CD, DECODE(LS.SSVC_HIGH_CD,'','000000',NULL,'000000',LS.SSVC_HIGH_CD) AS SSVC_HIGH_CD, NAUDIT_DHCP_MST_SEQ, MM.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, NLVL_MST_SEQ, STOP_NODE_CD, SOFFICE_CD, SL3_NESCODE, SL3_EQUIP_ALIAS, SL3_MSTIP, SSAID, SLLNUM, NIP_BLOCK_CNT, NIP_CNT, NMAX_PEAK, NMIN_PEAK, NAUDIT_VALUE, NOPIMIZE_VALUE, NDHCP_MIN_IP_BLOCK_CNT_OVER, NDHCP_MIN_IP_CNT_OVER, NDHCP_RANGE_DAYS, BAUDIT_YN, BOPTIMIZE_YN, DAUDIT_CHECK_DT, DAUDIT_PROCESS_DT, NOPTIMIZE_CHECK_DT, DOPTIMIZE_PROCESS_DT, SUSE_STATUS_CD, BFALG FROM MST.TB_AUDIT_DHCP_MST MM LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_ROLE_SUB LV ON MM.SOFFICE_CD = LV.SSVC_OFFICE_CD LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_ROLE_MST LS ON MM.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = LS.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AND LV.SSVC_OBJ_CD = LS.SSVC_OBJ_CD WHERE BOPTIMIZE_YN = 'Y' ) MMM GROUP BY SSVC_GROUP_CD, SSVC_HIGH_CD ) B ON A.SSVC_GROUP_CD = B.SSVC_GROUP_CD AND A.SSVC_HIGH_CD = B.SSVC_HIGH_CD LEFT JOIN MST.TB_AUDIT_ASSIGN_BAS C ON 1=1 )M2 ON M0.SSVC_GROUP_CD = M2.SSVC_GROUP_CD AND M0.SSVC_HIGH_CD = M2.SSVC_HIGH_CD LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MM.SSVC_GROUP_CD, MM.SSVC_HIGH_CD, NCNT_SUM, NCNT_ALL, CASE WHEN (NCNT_SUM * 100) / NCNT_ALL > NMAIN_NODE_TICKET_CNT_VALUE THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS SANAL_FLAG FROM ( SELECT SSVC_GROUP_CD, SSVC_HIGH_CD, SUM(NCNT) AS NCNT_SUM FROM (
SELECT SSVC_GROUP_CD, SSVC_HIGH_CD, SUM(NIP_BLOCK_CNT) AS NCNT
FROM MST.TB_AUDIT_DHCP_MST LV LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_ROLE_MST LS ON LV.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = LS.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AND LV.STOP_NODE_CD = LS.SSVC_HIGH_CD WHERE BAUDIT_YN = 'Y' OR BOPTIMIZE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY SSVC_GROUP_CD, SSVC_HIGH_CD
UNION ALL
SELECT LS.SSVC_GROUP_CD, LS.SSVC_HIGH_CD, COUNT(NCONFIG_ROUTE_SEQ) AS NCNT FROM ( SELECT SOFFICECODE, NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ, NCONFIG_ROUTE_SEQ FROM FCT.TB_CONFIG_ROUTE_MST WHERE SAUDIT_FLAG != '정상' )M LEFT JOIN MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST IP ON M.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ = IP.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_ROLE_SUB LV ON IP.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = LV.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AND M.SOFFICECODE = LV.SSVC_OFFICE_CD LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_ROLE_MST LS ON LV.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = LS.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AND LV.SSVC_OBJ_CD = LS.SSVC_OBJ_CD WHERE IP.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD IS NOT NULL GROUP BY LS.SSVC_GROUP_CD, LS.SSVC_HIGH_CD ) GROUP BY SSVC_GROUP_CD, SSVC_HIGH_CD ) MM LEFT JOIN ( SELECT C.SSVC_GROUP_CD, C.SSVC_HIGH_CD, COUNT(NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ) AS NCNT_ALL FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST A LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_MST B ON A.NLVL_MST_SEQ = B.NLVL_MST_SEQ LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_ROLE_MST C ON B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = C.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AND B.SSVC_GROUP_CD = C.SSVC_GROUP_CD AND B.SSVC_OBJ_CD = C.SSVC_OBJ_CD WHERE A.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD NOT IN ('IA0001','IA0002')
GROUP BY C.SSVC_GROUP_CD, C.SSVC_HIGH_CD
) TT ON MM.SSVC_GROUP_CD = TT.SSVC_GROUP_CD AND MM.SSVC_HIGH_CD = TT.SSVC_HIGH_CD LEFT JOIN MST.TB_AUDIT_ASSIGN_BAS C ON 1=1 )M3 ON M0.SSVC_GROUP_CD = M3.SSVC_GROUP_CD AND M0.SSVC_HIGH_CD = M3.SSVC_HIGH_CD
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT F0.SSVC_GROUP_CD, F1.SSVC_HIGH_CD, NCNT_NEOSS, CASE WHEN POWER(NCNT_NEOSS, 100) / NCNT_IPMS < F1.NMAIN_NODE_NEOSS_IPBLOCK_CHK_VALUE THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END SFACT_FLAG FROM ( SELECT B.SSVC_GROUP_CD, B.SSVC_HIGH_CD, COUNT(M.PIP_PREFIX) AS NCNT_NEOSS FROM ( SELECT PIP_PREFIX, SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, SICISOFFICESCODE FROM MIG.TB_ALLOC_MST_TMP_NEOSS_ALL WHERE SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD = 'CT0001' AND SICISOFFICESCODE IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(SICISOFFICESCODE) != '' ) M LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PIP_PREFIX, SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST WHERE SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD = 'CT0001' AND SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD NOT IN ('CL0006','CL0007') ) T ON M.PIP_PREFIX = T.PIP_PREFIX AND T.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD = M.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_SUB_CD A ON A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = 'CL0001' AND M.SICISOFFICESCODE = A.SLOFFICECODE LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_ROLE_MST B ON A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AND A.SLVL_CD = B.SSVC_OBJ_CD WHERE T.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ IS NULL AND B.SSVC_GROUP_CD IS NOT NULL GROUP BY B.SSVC_GROUP_CD, B.SSVC_HIGH_CD )F0 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT B.SSVC_GROUP_CD, B.SSVC_HIGH_CD, COUNT(T.PIP_PREFIX) AS NCNT_IPMS, C.NMAIN_NODE_NEOSS_IPBLOCK_CHK_VALUE FROM ( SELECT PIP_PREFIX, SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ, SSVC_GROUP_CD, SSVC_OBJ_CD FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST AA LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_MST BB ON AA.NLVL_MST_SEQ = BB.NLVL_MST_SEQ WHERE AA.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD = 'CT0001' AND AA.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD NOT IN ('CL0006','CL0007') AND BB.SSVC_GROUP_CD != '000000' AND BB.SSVC_OBJ_CD != '000000'
) T LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_SUB_CD A ON A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = 'CL0001' AND T.SSVC_OBJ_CD = A.SLOFFICECODE LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_ROLE_MST B ON A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AND A.SLVL_CD = B.SSVC_OBJ_CD LEFT JOIN MST.TB_AUDIT_ASSIGN_BAS C ON 1=1 WHERE B.SSVC_GROUP_CD IS NOT NULL AND B.SSVC_OBJ_CD IS NOT NULL GROUP BY B.SSVC_GROUP_CD, B.SSVC_HIGH_CD, C.NMAIN_NODE_NEOSS_IPBLOCK_CHK_VALUE ) F1 ON F0.SSVC_GROUP_CD = F1.SSVC_GROUP_CD AND F0.SSVC_HIGH_CD = F1.SSVC_HIGH_CD
) M4 ON M0.SSVC_GROUP_CD = M4.SSVC_GROUP_CD AND M0.SSVC_HIGH_CD = M4.SSVC_HIGH_CD
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT H0.SSVC_GROUP_CD, H0.SSVC_HIGH_CD, NALLOC_24, NALLOC_24_OVER, NALLOC_OUT_24, NALLOC_OUT_24_OVER , (NCNT_ASSIGN_SUM + NALLOC_OUT_24 + NALLOC_OUT_24_OVER - NALLOC_24 - NALLOC_24_OVER) AS NCNT_IP FROM ( SELECT SSVC_GROUP_CD, SSVC_HIGH_CD , SUM(NALLOC_24) AS NALLOC_24 , SUM(NALLOC_24_OVER) AS NALLOC_24_OVER , SUM(NALLOC_OUT_24) AS NALLOC_OUT_24 , SUM(NALLOC_OUT_24_OVER) AS NALLOC_OUT_24_OVER , SUM(NASSIGN) AS NASSIGN FROM ( SELECT A.SSVC_GROUP_CD , B.SSVC_HIGH_CD , CASE WHEN A.NTICKET_TYPE_SEQ IN (12) AND A.NBITMASK <= 24 THEN SUM(NCNT) ELSE 0 END AS NALLOC_24 , CASE WHEN A.NTICKET_TYPE_SEQ IN (12) AND A.NBITMASK > 24 THEN SUM(NCNT) ELSE 0 END AS NALLOC_24_OVER , CASE WHEN A.NTICKET_TYPE_SEQ IN (13) AND A.NBITMASK <= 24 THEN SUM(NCNT) ELSE 0 END AS NALLOC_OUT_24 , CASE WHEN A.NTICKET_TYPE_SEQ IN (13) AND A.NBITMASK > 24 THEN SUM(NCNT) ELSE 0 END AS NALLOC_OUT_24_OVER , CASE WHEN A.NTICKET_TYPE_SEQ IN (6,8) THEN SUM(NCNT) ELSE 0 END AS NASSIGN FROM MST.TB_TICKET_MST A LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_ROLE_MST B ON A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AND A.SSVC_GROUP_CD = B.SSVC_GROUP_CD AND A.SSVC_OBJ_CD = B.SSVC_OBJ_CD WHERE A.DCREATE_DT > CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL'3 MONTH' AND A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = 'CV0001' AND A.NTICKET_TYPE_SEQ IN (6,8,12,13) GROUP BY A.SSVC_GROUP_CD, B.SSVC_HIGH_CD, A.NTICKET_TYPE_SEQ, A.NBITMASK ) M WHERE M.SSVC_HIGH_CD IS NOT NULL AND M.SSVC_GROUP_CD != '000000' GROUP BY SSVC_GROUP_CD, SSVC_HIGH_CD ) H0 LEFT JOIN (
SELECT B.SSVC_GROUP_CD, B.SSVC_HIGH_CD, SUM(T.NCNT) AS NCNT_ASSIGN_SUM FROM ( SELECT NCNT, SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ, SSVC_GROUP_CD, SSVC_OBJ_CD FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST AA LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_MST BB ON AA.NLVL_MST_SEQ = BB.NLVL_MST_SEQ WHERE AA.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD = 'CT0001' AND AA.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD NOT IN ('CL0006','CL0007') AND SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD IN ('IA0003','IA0004') AND SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = 'CV0001' AND BB.SSVC_GROUP_CD != '000000' AND BB.SSVC_OBJ_CD != '000000'
) T LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_SUB_CD A ON A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = 'CL0001' AND T.SSVC_OBJ_CD = A.SLOFFICECODE LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_ROLE_MST B ON A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AND A.SLVL_CD = B.SSVC_OBJ_CD WHERE B.SSVC_GROUP_CD IS NOT NULL AND B.SSVC_OBJ_CD IS NOT NULL GROUP BY B.SSVC_GROUP_CD, B.SSVC_HIGH_CD
)H1 ON H0.SSVC_GROUP_CD = H1.SSVC_GROUP_CD AND H0.SSVC_HIGH_CD = H1.SSVC_HIGH_CD ) M5 ON M0.SSVC_GROUP_CD = M5.SSVC_GROUP_CD AND M0.SSVC_HIGH_CD = M5.SSVC_HIGH_CD
LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_CD AG ON M0.SSVC_GROUP_CD = AG.SLVL_CD LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_CD AH ON M0.SSVC_HIGH_CD = AH.SLVL_CD ) MAS WHERE SSVC_GROUP_CD != '000000' AND SSVC_HIGH_CD != '000000' ORDER BY SSVC_GROUP_NM, SSVC_HIGH_NM
